§6Signalum-Plated Fluiduct§f

§aHigher-capacity fluid transfer for mid-to-late game refinery and cooling systems!§f

§bSignalum-Plated Fluiducts§f provide increased throughput over hardened fluiducts, suitable for larger-scale fluid handling. They share the basic fluiduct behavior but lift the throughput ceiling significantly.

§6Crafting§f:
§b• Transparent§f: §e1× Signalum Ingot§f + §e1× Glass§f → §e6× Signalum-Plated Fluiduct§f.
§b• Opaque§f: §e1× Signalum Ingot§f + §e1× Lead Ingot§f → §e6× Signalum-Plated Fluiduct (Opaque)§f.

§6Network Pressure§f:
Like all fluiducts, throughput depends on network pressure. A fully pressurized Signalum-Plated network will outpace a basic fluiduct network under the same conditions, but an empty network still runs at half speed.

§eTip§f: Use §bFilters§f on Signalum-Plated Fluiducts to keep multiple fluid types separated in the same network by routing one fluid per filter side.
